mapper.sql: id, user_id, activity_id, order_no, status, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND activity_id = #{activityId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE seckill_order SET status = #{status} WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
